---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the problem or gap this feature would address. (e.g., "As a user, I'm frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible about how it should work.

## Alternative Approaches
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why you ruled them out.

## User Impact
- **Who is affected?** (e.g., all users, admins, first-time visitors)
- **How many users?** (estimated scope)
- **Urgency / Priority:** (e.g., blocking core flow, nice-to-have, accessibility concern)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
